steps.title: Welcome to LifeOS
steps.desc: Your control center for managing life – finances, organization and growth in one place.

steps.title: Dashboard
steps.desc: An overview of your finances, expenses, income and activity. All the key data on one screen.

steps.title: Finances
steps.desc: Expenses, income, recurring costs and net worth. Full control over your budget.

steps.title: Organization
steps.desc: A calendar with events, to-do lists and notes – quick notes, ideas and references.

steps.title: Growth
steps.desc: Habits, goals, learning (courses, books, projects) – track your progress.

steps.title: Ready?
steps.desc: Start with the Dashboard or use search (Ctrl+K) to quickly find any section.
